title: Sending Photos
drDigitalIntro: You can send photos through Messages. Click the + button and choose from your Photos app or take a new photo. Add a caption if you like, then send. The other person receives the photo instantly. Photos through Messages can be edited with effects before sending. This is how people share memories with family and friends instantly.

playgroundTask.question: How do you send a photo in Messages on your Mac?

options.text: Attach it to an email first
Click the + button and choose from your Photos
Take a screenshot and hope they see it
Upload it to Safari first, then share the link

drDigitalSuccess: The + button is your attachment button in Messages — use it to add photos, files, or anything else.
drDigitalHint: Look for the + (plus) icon next to the message box. It opens an attachment picker.
